news.title: Anthropic says Claude subscriptions will no longer support OpenClaw because it puts an 'outsized strain' on systems
news.description: Anthropic said third-party tools like OpenClaw put an "outsized strain on our systems." OpenClaw's founder said cutting support would be "a loss."

news.title: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party | TechCrunch
news.description: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

news.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman tells interviewer she shouldn't let her son use AI yet
